scope_note: QA-KG Agent Write Surface Cert [255] v1: Phase 6 agent-integration firewall. Primary source: docs/specs/QA_MEM_SCOPE.md (Dale, 2026); tools/qa_kg_mcp/server.py (Dale, 2026); memory/project_qa_mem_review_role.md (Dale, 2026). Validates that the MCP agent surface exposes EXACTLY four tools (qa_kg_search, qa_kg_get_node, qa_kg_neighbors, qa_kg_promote_agent_note), that the agent-write path cannot create non-AgentNote node types, and that direct DB writes to qa_kg.db from agent sessions are detected via the security audit. Gates: (W1, HARD) AST scan of tools/qa_kg_mcp/server.py confirms exactly four @mcp.tool functions and no authority>=internal node creation callsites in MCP scope; (W2, HARD) grep gate — kg.upsert_node(authority='agent',...) callsites confined to tools/qa_kg/extractors/agent_notes.py and tools/qa_kg/tests/; (W3a, HARD) qa_security_audit.check_qa_kg_db_direct_writes scans the wrapper ledger for direct-DB-write Bash calls; (W3b, HARD) qa_security_audit.check_mcp_provenance flags promoted-from edges missing the mcp_session marker; (W4, HARD) ephemeral rate-limit fixture simulates cap+1 promote calls and asserts RateLimitExceeded; (W5, HARD) authority is immutable both directions — agent -> internal AND primary -> agent raise FirewallViolation('authority_immutable'); (W6, HARD) --cap read_only MCP server omits qa_kg_promote_agent_note from tools/list; (W7, HARD) every MCP tool call logs to query_log (reads log k rows with rank >= 0; writes log 1 row with rank=-1 sentinel); (W8, HARD) no except-Exception-pass swallows in tools/qa_kg_mcp/ or tools/qa_kg/_audit.py (AST scan).
